Hotel yang tepat dengan harga terbaik

Type
Guest
Room

5 guests maximum. Infants don't count toward the number guests.

SERVICE

Our Service for your trip

Nikmati pengalaman liburanmu dengan mudah dan menyenangkan disini.

Free Wifi

Enjoy our complimentary wifi through out the hotel property.

Shuttle

Go to airport and hotel with Shuttle facilities for Rp. 10K / trip

Parking

Provide you parking slot for your vehicle in hotel area.

Safety Box

Keep your belonging in a safe place

Rooms

Explore our Rooms

Superior Room

Overview
  • 18 m2
  • Max 2 Guests
  • Twin or Double bed
  • 12:00 PM
  • Room Service, Hot Shower, AC, Wi-Fi, Cable TV, Toiletries, Sandals, Towel, and Mineral Water.
Publish Rate Rp 489.500 Rp 400.000/malam
(Breakfast included)

Deluxe Room

Overview
  • 18 m2
  • Max 2 Guests
  • Twin or Double bed
  • 12:00 PM

  • Extra Compliment: tea, coffee, sugar, coffee maker.
Publish Rate Rp 589.500 Rp 500.000/malam
(Breakfast included)

Review

Some review from our guests

  • Niroshan Sri Lanka

    “I just stayed one night there before I get my flight in Jakarta. It is a good place for airport transit as it is situated closer to Jakarta airport and they provide free airport shuttle”

  • Francesca United Kingdom

    “Excellent value for money for a short trip. The staff were brilliant and easy to contact over WhatsApp when our flight landed, they sent someone straightaway to pick us up. Good Indonesia breakfast. Clean rooms. Would recommend for people needing somewhere to stay in between flights- 10 minutes from the airport”

  • Damarwati Indonesia

    “The room so spacious, comfy, and clean. The staff so friendly, reminded me to breakfast, help me a lot. Tasty breakfast, recommended”

  • Niroshan Sri Lanka

    “I just stayed one night there before I get my flight in Jakarta. It is a good place for airport transit as it is situated closer to Jakarta airport and they provide free airport shuttle”

  • Francesca United Kingdom

    “Excellent value for money for a short trip. The staff were brilliant and easy to contact over WhatsApp when our flight landed, they sent someone straightaway to pick us up. Good Indonesia breakfast. Clean rooms. Would recommend for people needing somewhere to stay in between flights- 10 minutes from the airport”

  • Damarwati Indonesia

    “The room so spacious, comfy, and clean. The staff so friendly, reminded me to breakfast, help me a lot. Tasty breakfast, recommended”

Reservasi Sekarang

Kami akan memberikan konfirmasi 1 X 24 jam kepada Anda

Check-In Fri, 12 April 2019 Check-Out Sat, 13 April 2019 Room Superior 1 room & 1 Adult(s) Rate Rp. 800.000

Reservasi berhasil, silakan cek inbox/spam email Anda untuk detail reservasi dan langkah-langkah proses pembayaran. Terima kasih

      Promotion

      Flexible Check In and Check out. Stay as you wish

      Bebas waktu check in dan check out selama 26 jam.

        Untuk informasi lebih lanjut mengenai promo ini
        Hubungi kami via Whatsapp

        Cengkareng Transit Hotel is located 15 minutes away from Bandara Internasional Soekarno Hatta. Clean and comfortable rooms, attentive staff, good food and amazing service.There are 48 rooms, free shuttle service, WiFi, 24 hours Room Service and Receptionist ready to welcome you and accommodate your travel needs, before you go to your next destination.

        Cengkareng Transit Hotel, a perfect solution and smart choice for transit travellers.
